subtitle_en: The boat that became a mountain

data_card.value_id: Jujur, dan terima jika ada keinginan yang tak terwujud
data_card.value_en: Be honest, and accept when a wish cannot come true

sections.body_id: Di Tanah Sunda, hiduplah seorang wanita cantik bernama Dayang Sumbi bersama anaknya, Sangkuriang. Mereka juga memelihara seekor anjing setia bernama Tumang. Setiap hari Sangkuriang pergi berburu di hutan ditemani Tumang. Sangkuriang tumbuh menjadi pemuda yang kuat dan pemberani. Namun, suatu kejadian membuat ibunya marah, dan Sangkuriang pun pergi mengembara jauh.
sections.body_en: In the Sundanese land, there lived a beautiful woman named Dayang Sumbi with her son, Sangkuriang. They also kept a loyal dog named Tumang. Every day Sangkuriang went hunting in the forest with Tumang. Sangkuriang grew into a strong and brave young man. But one day something happened that made his mother upset, and Sangkuriang left to wander far away.

sections.body_id: Bertahun-tahun kemudian, Sangkuriang kembali ke kampung halamannya. Ia bertemu seorang wanita cantik dan ingin menikahinya. Wanita itu sebenarnya adalah Dayang Sumbi, ibunya sendiri, karena ia tetap awet muda. Ketika Dayang Sumbi menyadari hal itu, ia tidak mau menikah dengan Sangkuriang. Tetapi Sangkuriang tetap memaksa, jadi Dayang Sumbi memutar otak mencari cara.
sections.body_en: Many years later, Sangkuriang came back to his home village. He met a beautiful woman and wanted to marry her. The woman was actually Dayang Sumbi, his own mother, because she had stayed young forever. When Dayang Sumbi realized this, she did not want to marry Sangkuriang. But Sangkuriang kept insisting, so Dayang Sumbi thought hard for a way out.

sections.body_id: Dayang Sumbi memberi sebuah syarat yang sangat sulit. Sangkuriang harus membuat sebuah perahu besar dan sebuah danau (telaga) hanya dalam satu malam. Dayang Sumbi yakin tugas itu mustahil diselesaikan. Tetapi Sangkuriang sangat sakti. Ia memanggil para makhluk halus untuk membantunya membendung sungai dan membuat perahu raksasa.
sections.body_en: Dayang Sumbi gave him a very difficult task. Sangkuriang had to build a giant boat and a lake in just one night. Dayang Sumbi was sure the task was impossible to finish. But Sangkuriang was very powerful. He called upon the spirits to help him dam the river and carve a giant boat.

sections.body_id: Melihat pekerjaan hampir selesai, Dayang Sumbi pun bertindak cerdik. Ia membentangkan kain merah di timur agar langit tampak seperti fajar. Ayam-ayam berkokok, dan para makhluk halus melarikan diri karena mengira hari sudah pagi. Sangkuriang gagal dan sangat kecewa. Dengan kesal, ia menendang perahu besar itu hingga terbalik. Menurut legenda, perahu yang terbalik itu berubah menjadi Gunung Tangkuban Perahu yang ada sampai sekarang.
sections.body_en: Seeing the work almost done, Dayang Sumbi acted cleverly. She spread a red cloth in the east so the sky looked like dawn. The roosters crowed, and the spirits ran away because they thought morning had come. Sangkuriang failed and was very disappointed. In his frustration, he kicked the giant boat until it flipped over. According to the legend, that upturned boat became Mount Tangkuban Perahu, which still stands today.

moral_id: Kejujuran selalu lebih baik daripada memaksakan keinginan. Cerita ini juga mengajarkan bahwa tidak semua keinginan bisa terwujud, dan kita harus belajar menerima dengan lapang dada.
moral_en: Honesty is always better than forcing your own wishes. This story also teaches that not every wish can come true, and we must learn to accept that with an open heart.

facts.id: Nama 'Tangkuban Perahu' berarti 'perahu yang terbalik' (tangkub = telungkup) dalam bahasa Sunda.
facts.en: The name 'Tangkuban Perahu' means 'an upturned boat' (tangkub = facing down) in the Sundanese language.

facts.id: Gunung Tangkuban Perahu sungguh ada dan bisa kamu kunjungi di dekat Kota Bandung, Jawa Barat!
facts.en: Mount Tangkuban Perahu is real and you can visit it near the city of Bandung, West Java!

facts.id: Gunung Tangkuban Perahu adalah gunung berapi yang masih aktif dan punya kawah besar.
facts.en: Mount Tangkuban Perahu is an active volcano with a large crater.

facts.id: Cerita ini juga menjelaskan asal-usul Gunung Burangrang dan dataran tinggi Bandung.
facts.en: This story also explains the origin of Mount Burangrang and the Bandung highlands.

facts.id: Para ahli geologi percaya dahulu kala memang ada danau purba besar di lembah Bandung.
facts.en: Geologists believe a huge ancient lake really did exist long ago in the Bandung valley.

facts.id: Legenda Sangkuriang sudah ditulis dalam naskah kuno Bujangga Manik dari abad ke-15.
facts.en: The Sangkuriang legend was written down in the ancient Bujangga Manik manuscript from the 15th century.

glossary.def_id: Danau kecil; genangan air yang luas di antara daratan.
glossary.def_en: A small lake; a wide pool of water surrounded by land.

glossary.def_id: Kendaraan untuk berlayar di air, lebih kecil daripada kapal.
glossary.def_en: A vehicle for traveling on water, smaller than a ship.

glossary.def_id: Lubang besar di puncak gunung berapi tempat keluarnya asap dan lava.
glossary.def_en: A large hole at the top of a volcano where smoke and lava come out.

glossary.def_id: Memiliki kekuatan gaib atau kemampuan luar biasa.
glossary.def_en: Having magical powers or extraordinary abilities.

glossary.def_id: Makhluk gaib yang tidak terlihat mata, sering muncul dalam cerita rakyat.
glossary.def_en: Invisible magical beings that often appear in folk tales.

glossary.def_id: Suku bangsa dan budaya yang berasal dari Jawa Barat.
glossary.def_en: An ethnic group and culture from West Java.

gallery.caption_id: Kawah besar Gunung Tangkuban Perahu. Lihat, bentuknya melebar seperti perahu yang ditelungkupkan!
gallery.caption_en: The huge crater of Mount Tangkuban Perahu. Look, its wide shape is like a boat turned upside down!

gallery.caption_id: Kabut tipis menyelimuti kawah Tangkuban Perahu, gunung dari cerita Sangkuriang.
gallery.caption_en: Thin mist covers the crater of Tangkuban Perahu, the mountain from the Sangkuriang story.

gallery.caption_id: Pemandangan gunung-gunung di sekitar Bandung saat senja, termasuk Gunung Burangrang dari legenda ini.
gallery.caption_en: A view of the mountains around Bandung at dusk, including Mount Burangrang from this legend.
